---
title: "help_page_2"
author: "Edward"
date: "2025-03-04"
output: html_document
---

<div style="color:green; ">
Main Tabs:
</div>

- **Welcome**: Introduction and overview
- **About**: Project objectives, study area map, and methodology
- **Help**: This guide (you are here!)
- **Analysis**: Main data exploration tools
- **Appendix**: Additional plots and technical details
- **Code**: Access GitHub repository


---
